title: Visually Optimized
description: A collage of vibrant cultures, seasons with the serenity mod, optimisations with sodium and libraries along with inbuilt library to search between and surf through Modrinth from inside Minecraft. Now with a little tweaks in name and other stuff.
body:
##  ![Visually Optimised](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52ff2d329cc87c52cd5819eb5a04f169398df918_0.webp)

_**A modpack comprising of modrinth available mods for performance and visual enhancements.**_
### Now with a lot more features than past and new compatibilities and libraries.
###  With this modpack I am going for some changes in next versions uploading new mods in the pack.
_The Developer has made an website even for cracked minecraft users! You can access everything from there present in the modpack and the website will be upgraded along with the modrinth page!._

**_[Visually Optimized(For Cracked MC users)](https://visually-optimized.netlify.app/)_**

<details>
<summary>Name and Style changes!</summary>

The Pack has gotten an overhaul with the name now being Visually Optimised instead of the older Project Kxiro, dont you think the previous was a little boring?

</details>


> The finale of visuals meeting with performance -KxiroXD
_________________________________________________________________________________________________

Features-

_**-Player Animations**_

_**-Third Person and First Person cams are now here!!**_

_**-Fps Booster**_

_-Selection and updates for creative mode builders_

_-Simple yet Managable modlist_

_-Free marketplace system for resource packs,shaders,datapacks and more.._

_-3D visuals for ladders,rails and mace_

_-Shaders for enhanced visuals_

_-Freecam for builders_

_-Animated entities_

_-1.21.10 and 1.21.4 support_

_-Night Vision/Gamma mod support_

_-Got a ton of visual mods and season mods_

_-And many more...._

________________________________________________________________________________________________
For any queries related to the modpack please report to my discord server.I will try to manage them as soon as possible.

<details>
<summary>From the Developer</summary>

Version 1.21.10 is now finally here! Yeah I was too late to catch on bcz my health detoriated and so I went through a digital detox. I will be uploading quicker now but still there will be a little time between updates as I also need them to be available on modrinth.

</details>
-  Discord - kxiroxd


<details>
<summary>Discord Server And Patreon Page Info</summary>

> ## - **_Discord Server - https://discord.gg/QzxC3fgq9D_**
> My Patreon Page does not contain any donation links for now so you can just visit the page to get updates on my work. Please support this small creator ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡.

</details>
By the way if you have any complaints and bug reports please do inform me for further updates and bug fixes!
